## Landing Page Checklist

- [ ] Page is linked from `src/index.html` when public.
- [ ] Page is registered in `src/landing-pages.json` when public.
- [ ] Assets are local, compressed, and licensed for public use.
- [ ] No secrets, tracking scripts, external scripts, or external stylesheets were added.
- [ ] Any size-budget or security exception is documented in this PR.
